arts.ttl: Graham Potter ready to return after ‘frustration, anger and bitterness’ of Chelsea sacking
arts.sum: The former Blues boss is looking for his next role after time away from football management

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca offers Ben Chilwell a lifeline after previously placing the defender in his 'bomb squad' and said it was 'better' for him to leave Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: The left-back was among a number of high-profile players who were excluded from first-team training by the Chelsea manager over the summer and looked set to leave the club.

arts.ttl: Harry Redknapp sends Nicolas Jackson warning and makes bold Chelsea v Brighton score prediction
arts.sum: All the latest news ahead of Brighton’s trip to Chelsea this Saturday

arts.ttl: £18m Chelsea loanee the best in Europe's top five leagues for one impressive stat this season
arts.sum: Andrey Santos is currently top of the charts for goalscoring in Europe's top five leagues amongst central midfielders.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals reason Christopher Nkunku does not start for Chelsea
arts.sum: In recent games, Nkunku's performances have arguably warranted a spot in Maresca's first XI - his late strike against Bournemouth proved decisive in handing Chelsea three points. However, his performance was not enough to earn him a starting place against West Ham United last weekend - Nkunku featured from the bench, replacing Nicolas Jackson on the 64th minute.

arts.ttl: ‘Desperate’ Behdad Eghbali pushing Chelsea to retain player Enzo Maresca thinks is inconsistent
arts.sum: Chelsea co-owner Behdad Eghbali played a key role in the Blues signing Mykhaylo Mudryk from Shakhtar Donetsk 18 months ago. Heavily linked at the time with a move to Arsenal, Mudryk, 23, ended up on the blue side of London after Chelsea agreed a deal with Shakhtar worth a staggering £88.5 million. Despite arriving at […] The post ‘Desperate’ Behdad Eghbali pushing Chelsea to retain player Enzo Maresca thinks is inconsistent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms sensational U-turn over exiled Chelsea star - 'We all make mistakes'
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca told Ben Chilwell and a number of other players that they were surplus to requirements at the club but has now handed the left-back a reprieve

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday six this weekend and Tom McGarry has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea & Man Utd join race for 'new Angel Di Maria'
arts.sum: Fernandez signed a contract extension at Velez back in April 2023, but his current deal is due to expire at the end of December 2025 and he is likely to be on the move next year as a result. Chelsea and Manchester United are reportedly among the clubs interested in signing Velez Sarsfield youngster Thiago Fernandez.

arts.ttl: 'I'll go for': Alan Shearer predicts the result of Chelsea vs Brighton this weekend
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has made his pre-match prediction ahead of the upcoming clash between Chelsea and Brighton this weekend. Chelsea welcome Brighton to Stamford Bridge this...
